name: Swedish Cream Wafers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dough ingredients and chill for 1 hour. The dough will be sticky.
2. When ready to roll out, divide the dough into 4 parts and roll thin on a well-floured board.
3. Cut the rolled dough with a small juice glass.
4. Dip each side of the circle into granulated sugar.
5. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet and bake at 375°F for 7-9 minutes.
6. Prick each cookie with a fork when they begin to puff up.
7. Let cool.
8. Blend together the filling ingredients until smooth.
